mnemonics.title: Array Index Rule
mnemonics.content: ZERO TO N-1: ARRAY INDICES ALWAYS START AT ZERO AND GO UP TO LENGTH MINUS ONE

mnemonics.title: Array Declaration
mnemonics.content: TYPE BRACKETS NAME: DECLARE ARRAYS AS TYPE[] NAME OR TYPE NAME[]

mnemonics.title: Default Values
mnemonics.content: ZOMBIE: ZERO FOR NUMS, FALSE FOR BOOLEAN, NULL FOR OBJECTS, EMPTY CHAR FOR CHAR

mnemonics.title: Length vs Length()
mnemonics.content: ARRAYS USE LENGTH PROPERTY (NO PARENTHESES), STRINGS USE LENGTH() METHOD

mnemonics.title: Array Access Time
mnemonics.content: CONSTANT ACCESS: DIRECT ADDRESS CALCULATION MEANS O(1) LOOKUP

acronyms.expansion: Java Virtual Machine - allocates heap memory for arrays
acronyms.usage: When you create an array, JVM allocates contiguous memory in heap

acronyms.expansion: Application Programming Interface - Arrays class provides utility methods
acronyms.usage: Use Arrays.sort(), Arrays.toString(), Arrays.fill() for operations

acronyms.expansion: Last In First Out - not directly related but contrasts with array access
acronyms.usage: Remember arrays allow random access unlike stack which is sequential

acronyms.expansion: Object-Oriented Programming - arrays are objects in Java
acronyms.usage: Arrays inherit from Object class and have methods like clone()

visualTips.visualization: THINK OF AN ARRAY AS A HOTEL WITH NUMBERED ROOMS. ROOM NUMBERS START AT 0. ROOM 0 IS THE FIRST ROOM, ROOM 1 IS THE SECOND. THE HOTEL MANAGER (JVM) KNOWS EXACTLY WHERE EACH ROOM IS LOCATED.
DRAW ARRAYS AS CONSECUTIVE BOXES IN A ROW. EACH BOX HAS AN INDEX BELOW IT. THE BOXES ARE LOCKED TOGETHER - NO GAPS. THIS EXPLAINS WHY ACCESS IS FAST.
A 2D ARRAY IS LIKE A SPREADSHEET OR CHESS BOARD. THE FIRST BRACKET CHOOSES THE ROW, THE SECOND CHOOSES THE COLUMN. JAGGED ARRAYS ARE LIKE TRIANGULAR TABLES.
WHEN YOU WRITE INT[] A = NEW INT[5], DRAW AN ARROW FROM VARIABLE 'A' TO A BOX LABELED 'ARRAY OBJECT' IN HEAP. BOTH A AND B POINTING TO SAME BOX MEANS THEY SEE SAME DATA.

analogies.analogy: DECLARING AN ARRAY IS LIKE RESERVING A ROW OF TABLES IN A RESTAURANT. YOU SAY 'I NEED 5 TABLES' BUT THEY'RE EMPTY UNTIL YOU PUT PEOPLE (VALUES) IN THEM.
ARRAY INDEX IS LIKE SEAT NUMBERS IN A THEATER. IF YOU HAVE 10 SEATS, THEY'RE NUMBERED 0-9. YOU CAN'T SAY 'SHOW ME SEAT 10' - IT DOESN'T EXIST.
ARRAYS ARE LIKE CONCRETE PARKING SPACES ONCE BUILT. YOU CAN'T ADD OR REMOVE SPACES LATER. YOU MUST BUILD A NEW PARKING LOT FOR MORE CARS.
AN ARRAY VARIABLE IS LIKE A HOUSE ADDRESS. THE ADDRESS (VARIABLE) IS ON THE STACK, BUT THE HOUSE (ARRAY OBJECT) IS IN THE HEAP NEIGHBORHOOD.
DEFAULT VALUES ARE LIKE DEFAULT SETTINGS ON A NEW PHONE. NUMERIC IS 0, BOOLEAN IS FALSE (NOTHING IS OFF), OBJECTS ARE NULL (NO CONTACT LINKED).
